name: Workers comp vs suing machine maker after work injury?
description: Comp for basics, sue maker for more if defective.

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs suing machine maker after work injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for basics, sue maker for more if defective.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers comp first for quick no-fault benefits; sue manufacturer separately for defects under product liability.[6][10] Comp limits recovery but lawsuit adds pain/suffering damages.[9] Key factors: Prove defect caused accident; comp lien on settlement. Attorney coordinates both.
